profile.name: Sourav Pattanaik
profile.subTagline: I use the lens of bioinformatics to study Biological Phenomena.

pillars.title: Education
bullets: Integrated Master's of Science in Biology with a Minor degree in Chemistry, NISER '26
Competative Exams: NEST (AIR 263), GATE (AIR 1173), OJEE (State Rank 3), OUAT (AIR 81)

pillars.title: Research
bullets: Published article on Multi-epitope vaccine design against structural proteins of Langya Virus
Research project on Sepsis early diagnosis supported by the IAS
Computational Discovery of novel treatment strategy for Testicular Cancer
Recieved Support of ₹4 lakh for Int. MSc program through DAE-DISHA Scholar (2021-2026)
Check my CV for other achievements and stay tuned for more cool updates

pillars.title: Sports
bullets: Represented University at Inter-IISER Sports meet Basketball (IISM 2023)
Bronze Medals in Inter-batch Badminton (2025) and Football (2024) Competetions

pillars.title: Co-curricular
bullets: Managed ₹50,000 budget as a Gym treasurer (2024-2025)
Student Representative in the Disciplinary Action Committee for Studenys (DAC)[2025]
Finalist of BENSPARK Ideathon, IISER Pune

academics.title: Master's Thesis Defense
academics.text: Defending my research on stimulus-responsive drug carriers. It was the culmination of two years of work integrating bioinformatics with wet-lab validation.

academics.title: Summer at ICMR-NIREH
academics.text: My internship focused on genomic biomarkers. Working with Dr. Sindhuprava Rana opened my eyes to the power of precision medicine.

sports.title: IISM Basketball 2023
sports.text: Representing NISER on the national stage. The intensity of the competition and the team spirit were unforgettable.

sports.title: Inter-batch Champions
sports.text: Securing the gold for our batch. Athletics has always been my way of staying grounded amidst rigorous academic schedules.

cocurricular.title: Gym Club Leadership
cocurricular.text: As Treasurer, I managed budgets and organized power-lifting events. It taught me the importance of financial accountability and team coordination.
